title: Plan with Claude Opus, Build with Kimi K2.6? LIVE Mixed-Provider Benchmark
summary: Archon is a benchmarking framework used to systematically compare different LLM provider compositions. In this case, it tested four variations of planning and implementation across Claude Opus and Kimi K2.6 against real GitHub issues, measuring outcomes across seven evaluation dimensions.
